title: Nexus PublishStoryRequest
description: Request body for POST /v1/publish/story — platform Publish API (display fields, idempotency, chapter selection).

world_id.description: World that owns the publish operation

manuscript_id.description: Optional manuscript aggregate; platform may derive context without it

story_manifest_id.description: Optional specific manifest; when omitted the platform may use the active manifest

title.description: Display title for the published story

chapter_ids.description: Ordered chapter artifact identifiers to include in this publish

idempotency_key.description: Client-supplied idempotency token for safe retries

sync_command_id.description: Optional link to originating sync command
